notes: Phase 1 direct queue artifact is the canonical ready-to-run file.
Prompt Factory generate requests below are operator presets and may still reflect benchmark/checkpoint bias unless checkpoint preferences are pinned first.
Phase 2 should duplicate the winning 25-row block twice and swap checkpoints to waiIllustriousSDXL_v160.safetensors and animayhemPaleRider_v2TrueGrit.safetensors.
Phase 3 should duplicate the final two winning 25-row blocks three times each for character lock, environment drift, and intensity ladder variants.

generate_request.concept_brief: Original adult beauty star, solo editorial glamour, luxury lingerie styling, premium hotel interiors, polished celebrity aura.
generate_request.creative_brief: Keep the subject clearly adult, beautiful, and non-IP. Prioritize elegant beauty, premium styling, readable face, and expensive atmosphere.

direction_pack_override.scene_hook: Luxury hotel editorial built around a high-value original star persona.
direction_pack_override.camera_plan: Portrait and three-quarter glamour coverage with clean composition.
direction_pack_override.pose_plan: Calm confidence with direct eye contact and elegant posture.
direction_pack_override.environment: High-end suite, balcony, or lounge space with premium set dressing.
direction_pack_override.device_focus: No device anchor; character beauty and styling lead the frame.
direction_pack_override.lighting_plan: Soft key light, window glow, and polished cinematic highlights.
direction_pack_override.material_focus: Silk, satin, jewelry, and upscale interior textures.
direction_pack_override.intensity_hook: Tasteful sensuality and aspirational beauty rather than fetish coding.

generate_request.concept_brief: Original adult beauty star, solo high-fashion glamour, red carpet mood, celebrity aura, flash-heavy editorial.
generate_request.creative_brief: Bias toward clean high-fashion beauty, paparazzi glam, and repeatable star presence. Keep the scene glamorous and non-IP.

direction_pack_override.scene_hook: Celebrity-coded beauty shoot with red carpet energy and paparazzi flash.
direction_pack_override.camera_plan: Beauty close-ups and polished half-body red carpet angles.
direction_pack_override.pose_plan: Public-facing confidence with sharp chin line and star posture.
direction_pack_override.environment: Premiere arrival, backstage glam room, or flash-heavy event corridor.
direction_pack_override.device_focus: No prop dependency; makeup, gown structure, and public presence carry the shot.
direction_pack_override.lighting_plan: Flash glam, specular highlights, and beauty dish polish.
direction_pack_override.material_focus: Sheer couture, sequins, satin drape, polished hair and makeup.
direction_pack_override.intensity_hook: Star aura and desirability over explicit exposure.

generate_request.concept_brief: Original adult beauty star, solo dark romance editorial, corset couture, candlelit interiors, elegant dramatic light.
generate_request.creative_brief: Push dramatic elegance, shadow contrast, and romantic melancholy while keeping the character aspirational and clearly original.

direction_pack_override.scene_hook: Romantic darkness with couture corsetry and moody cinematic beauty.
direction_pack_override.camera_plan: Dramatic portraiture and medium shots that preserve elegance.
direction_pack_override.pose_plan: Graceful poses with controlled melancholy and long hair motion.
direction_pack_override.environment: Candlelit chamber, velvet salon, or shadowed gallery space.
direction_pack_override.device_focus: No apparatus; costume silhouette and atmosphere do the work.
direction_pack_override.lighting_plan: Candle glow, dramatic side light, and deep shadow separation.
direction_pack_override.material_focus: Corset couture, velvet, lace, and antique metallic accents.
direction_pack_override.intensity_hook: Beauty-first dark romance with sensual tension, not overt fetish.

generate_request.concept_brief: Original adult alt-goth heroine, solo fashion-forward beauty, black lace, smoky eyes, club lighting, strong character read.
generate_request.creative_brief: Keep the face memorable, the styling alt-forward, and the energy cool rather than chaotic. Avoid obvious IP cosplay cues.

direction_pack_override.scene_hook: Alt-goth heroine with strong face identity and cool club confidence.
direction_pack_override.camera_plan: Portrait and waist-up coverage with attitude-forward framing.
direction_pack_override.pose_plan: Calm dominance, cool eye contact, and fashion-led posture.
direction_pack_override.environment: Club backroom, alley neon spill, dressing mirror, or velvet booth.
direction_pack_override.device_focus: No device dependency; makeup, lace, and silhouette define the pack.
direction_pack_override.lighting_plan: Moody club light, colored spill, and hard rim accents.
direction_pack_override.material_focus: Black lace, leather accents, chokers, sheer layers.
direction_pack_override.intensity_hook: High-character alternative beauty without IP references.

generate_request.concept_brief: Original adult sci-fi heroine, solo sleek tactical bodysuit, visor, neon lab, futuristic styling, clean silhouette.
generate_request.creative_brief: Aim for original futuristic character appeal rather than direct franchise resemblance. Keep the costume readable and premium.

generate_request.concept_brief: Original adult occult fashion heroine, solo dark academy styling, ritual sigils, structured outfit, mystic elegance.

direction_pack_override.pose_plan: Controlled elegance with ritual-coded gestures and poised stillness.

generate_request.concept_brief: Original adult glamour heroine, solo long-leg styling, stockings, stilettos, choker, soft flash beauty.
generate_request.creative_brief: Keep this pack broad and clickable. Emphasize glamour, polish, long-leg composition, and repeatable star quality.

generate_request.concept_brief: Original adult glamour heroine, solo thigh-high boots, gloves, commanding stance, editorial power pose.
generate_request.creative_brief: Keep the result glamorous and powerful, not campy. Boots and posture should define the lane.

direction_pack_override.camera_plan: Low-tilt hero shots and strong doorway compositions.
direction_pack_override.pose_plan: Commanding stance, shoulders back, deliberate stride, no chaos.
direction_pack_override.environment: Doorway frame, corridor, leather chair set, or clean industrial hall.
direction_pack_override.device_focus: Thigh-high boots, gloves, and silhouette authority.
direction_pack_override.lighting_plan: Editorial side light with crisp contrast and floor reflections.
direction_pack_override.material_focus: Leather, polished boots, clean tailoring, metallic trims.
direction_pack_override.intensity_hook: Power-coded styling with broader appeal than direct BDSM coding.
